title: Yetho Yethotho Lyrics Maruthavelu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Mathangi 
Song: Yetho Yethotho
MOvie: Maruthavelu
Music: James Vasanth
Lyrics: Mohanraj

Yetho Yethotho ennam vandhu 
Thoondil meenagiren
Yenno yenono thookamengum
Undhan binbam kaanugiren
Thottu pogum unswasakaatrai katti podoven
Naan katti pottu en sondham endru 
Uyirile mooduven ...

Kaadhal Kanthaanam seidhadhrenru
Enakul unnai paarkiren
Thookam indri en porvayodu 
Udhan kadhaiyai pesukiren
Endhan kanavu ne vandhu theenda
Kangal vizhikiren
Oh .. naagam pola en kannam engum
regai naan kaangiren

Thooral podum, paarvai podhum
Unnai bommaiyaki en veetil vaithu
Pootikulla vendum.
NIllamale kaalgal rendum
Engengume thaavyie oduthe...
Ennagumo ennennaagumo unnal maari pogiren

Naanul nanendru namba villai
ennai ne maatrinaai
Kaalai maalai ennule vandhu
Kalveesi odukindrai
Muttru pulli illadha aasai nenjil poothatho
En ellai kodu unnale indru kollai poginradho

[Thooral podum, paarvai podhum
Unnai bommaiyaki en veetil vaithu
Pootikulla vendum.
NIllamale kaalgal rendum
Engengume thaavyie oduthe...
Ennagumo ennennaagumo unnal maari pogiren] (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yetho Yethotho'?

The song conveys feelings of love and longing, expressing the emotional turmoil of the singer.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Maruthavelu'?

In the movie, this song reflects the protagonist's deep feelings for their love interest, highlighting the romantic theme.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Mathangi and composed by James Vasanthan.

When was 'Yetho Yethotho' released?

The song was released on July 10, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Yetho Yethotho', the protagonist expresses their deep emotional connection and longing for their beloved. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics by Mohanraj, creates a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song encapsulates the essence of love, portraying the bittersweet feelings that accompany it. The enchanting vocals of Mathangi further elevate the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in the film *Maruthavelu*.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yetho Yethotho from Maruthavelu is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Mathangi's soulful vocals and James Vasanthan's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of romance. Dive into this lyrical journey that promises to tug at your heartstrings!
stanzaMeanings: I am feeling restless and confused. I see your happiness everywhere, and I want to tie my breath to yours. I will tie it and say that my life is connected to you.
I have been told about love, and I see you in my dreams. I am speaking about my life without any sleep. My dreams are coming true, and my eyes are shining like a snake.
I want to keep you as a doll in my house, where you can be admired. Our feet will dance together everywhere. I am changing because of you.
I am not what I used to be; you have changed me. The morning and evening have come into my heart, and my desires are blooming without any limits. Is today going to be a disaster because of you?
[I want to keep you as a doll in my house, where you can be admired. Our feet will dance together everywhere. I am changing because of you.]
